glosses.ja: さまざまな; いくつかの

sentences.target: Je lis divers articles ce matin.

translations.fr: Je lis divers articles ce matin.
translations.en: I’m reading various articles this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana estoy leyendo varios artículos.
translations.de: Ich lese heute Morgen verschiedene Artikel.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 다양한 기사를 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上在看各种文章。
translations.yue: 今朝我睇緊唔同嘅文章。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром я читаю разные статьи.
translations.pt: Esta manhã estou a ler vários artigos.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi đang đọc nhiều bài viết khác nhau.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці я читаю різні статті.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं तरह-तरह के लेख पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί διαβάζω διάφορα άρθρα.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig leser jeg forskjellige artikler.
translations.id: Pagi ini saya membaca berbagai artikel.
translations.sv: Nu på morgonen läser jag olika artiklar.
translations.ro: În această dimineață citesc diverse articole.
translations.da: Her til morgen læser jeg forskellige artikler.
translations.ja: 今朝はいろいろな記事を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object ('articles').
Attributive adjective, masculine plural; pre-nominal modifier of 'articles'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'lis'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin' to form a temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement indicating when the action occurs.

sentences.target: On propose divers ateliers cet été.

translations.fr: On propose divers ateliers cet été.
translations.en: We’re offering various workshops this summer.
translations.de: Diesen Sommer bieten wir verschiedene Workshops an.
translations.zh-Hans: 今年夏天我们提供各种工作坊。
translations.yue: 今個夏天我哋會提供各種工作坊。
translations.ru: Этим летом мы предлагаем различные мастер-классы.
translations.he: הקיץ הזה אנחנו מציעים סדנאות שונות.
translations.vi: Mùa hè này chúng tôi tổ chức nhiều lớp học.
translations.ar: هذا الصيف نحن نقدم ورش عمل متنوعة.
translations.nl: Deze zomer bieden we diverse workshops aan.
translations.uk: Цього літа ми пропонуємо різні майстер-класи.
translations.hi: इस गर्मी हम विभिन्न कार्यशालाएँ पेश कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φέτος το καλοκαίρι προσφέρουμε διάφορα εργαστήρια.
translations.nb: I sommer tilbyr vi ulike workshops.
translations.id: Musim panas ini kami menawarkan berbagai lokakarya.
translations.sv: I sommar erbjuder vi olika workshops.
translations.da: Denne sommer tilbyder vi forskellige workshops.
translations.ja: この夏はさまざまなワークショップを開催します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; often colloquially equals 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with subject 'On'; transitive.
Attributive adjective, masculine plural; pre-nominal modifier of 'ateliers'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'propose'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form used before vowel-initial nouns; modifies 'été'.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement indicating the season.

sentences.target: Il y a divers événements ce week-end.
sentences.reading: /il i a di.vɛʁ ze.ve.nə.mɑ̃ sə wi.kɛnd/

translations.fr: Il y a divers événements ce week-end.
translations.ipa: /il i a di.vɛʁ ze.ve.nə.mɑ̃ sə wi.kɛnd/
translations.en: There are various events this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana hay varios eventos.
translations.de: An diesem Wochenende gibt es verschiedene Veranstaltungen.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana ci sono vari eventi.
translations.yue: 呢個週末有唔同嘅活動。
translations.ru: В эти выходные будут различные мероприятия.
translations.pt: Neste fim de semana há vários eventos.
translations.tr: Bu hafta sonu çeşitli etkinlikler var.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này có nhiều sự kiện khác nhau.
translations.ar: في نهاية هذا الأسبوع توجد فعاليات متنوعة.
translations.nl: Dit weekend zijn er verschillende evenementen.
translations.hu: Ezen a hétvégén különféle események lesznek.
translations.pl: W ten weekend odbędą się różne wydarzenia.
translations.el: Αυτό το σαββατοκύριακο υπάρχουν διάφορες εκδηλώσεις.
translations.nb: Denne helgen er det ulike arrangementer.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini ada berbagai acara.
translations.sv: I helgen finns det olika evenemang.
translations.ro: În acest weekend au loc diverse evenimente.
translations.cs: Tento víkend se konají různé akce.
translations.da: I weekenden er der forskellige arrangementer.
translations.ja: 今週末はいろいろなイベントがあります。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; functions as existential predicate in 'il y a' (= 'there is/are').
Attributive adjective, masculine plural; pre-nominal modifier of 'événements'.
Common noun, masculine plural; notional noun phrase complement of the existential construction (direct object of 'a').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'week-end'; temporal deixis.
Common compound noun, masculine; temporal complement indicating when the events occur.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们出售各种本地产品。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bán nhiều sản phẩm địa phương khác nhau.
translations.hi: हम विभिन्न स्थानीय उत्पाद बेचते हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちはさまざまな地元の製品を販売しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; marks the subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'produits' as direct object.
Attributive adjective, masculine plural; pre-nominal modifier of 'produits'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'vendons'.
Adjective, masculine plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'produits'.
